#### 🔌 Usage

<dl>
<dd>

<dl>
<dd>

```python
from fern import FernApi

client = FernApi(
    tenant="YOUR_TENANT",
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.cookies.getsession()

```
